title: Cloth Physics Studio
description: Verlet-integrated cloth simulator — pin, cut, grab, and blow the fabric in real time.
concept: A real-time cloth physics sandbox driven by Verlet integration and constraint solving. Choose from four preset configurations (flag, curtain, hammock, tablecloth), then sculpt the fabric with three tools: pin points to anchor them, cut constraints to tear the cloth, or grab and drag to deform it. A strain heat-map colors the fabric from blue (relaxed) to red (stressed), revealing the physics live. Wind, turbulence sliders, and a gust button give you full environmental control; export any frame as a PNG.
features: Verlet integration with configurable stiffness (3–30 constraint iterations)
Pin tool: click any point to anchor/release it from physics
Cut tool: drag across cloth to sever structural connections
Grab tool: click-drag to deform cloth with simulated velocity
Gust + Shake buttons for environmental forces
Strain heat-map render (blue→red) with pseudo-AO from quad area
Physics sliders: Gravity, Wind, Turbulence, Stiffness, Damping
Export PNG + Save/Load pin configurations via localStorage

interaction.click: Pin/unpin points (Pin tool), grab cloth (Grab tool)
interaction.drag: Cut connections (Cut tool), move cloth (Grab tool)
interaction.keyboard: None — toolbar + sliders for all controls
